verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus said, if you just do favors for those That do favors for you the publicans do the same thing You must be kind to those, who are unkind to you Do good those that who do evil to you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Reverence, we ought to honor one another Respect one another, as brother and sister And loved one another, with undying love That's very a good sign, of Christianity

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love those who does not love to you Love the unlovable, because God is watching you God was good to you, when you're evil to him, While you were yet sinners, Christ died for you.
